case_title: SMITH, ANGELA vs. THOMSON, TANYA NGUYEN et al

docket_entries.description: OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-23-2002, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JAN-23-2002, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID.
